\tzpentry{ID3529}{Propagator Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3529 introduces Propagator Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ G_\ell(r,\theta)=\mathcal N\, r^{|\ell|}\, e^{-r^2/(2\sigma_r^2)} e^{i\ell\theta}, \]
